AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TEST.title: Test
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TEST2.title: Test 2
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TEST3.title: Test 3
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TEST3.description: Choose a card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]. It gains [gold]Haunted[/gold] and [gold]Bury[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-YOINK.title: Yoink
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BOOP.title: Boop
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BOOP.description: #[gold]Osty[/gold] deals !OstyDamage! damage to a random enemy.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-STRIKE.title: Strike
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-DEFEND.title: Defend
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-DOUBLE_POKE.title: Double Poke
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-DOUBLE_POKE.description:
#[gold]Osty[/gold] deals !OstyDamage! damage !Repeat! times.
[gold]Disinter[/gold] up to !Disinter! card(s).
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SHOVEL_BONK.title: Shovel Bonk
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SHOVEL_BONK.description:
#Deal !D! damage.
[gold]Bury[/gold] !Bury! random [gold]Haunted[/gold] {Bury:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], [gold]Discard Pile[/gold], or [gold]Hand[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-OOPSIES.title: Oopsies
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SAFE_KEEPING.title: Safe Keeping
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-AWOO.title: Awoo
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-AWOO.description:
#Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies.
Apply !MisfortunePower! [gold]Misfortune[/gold] to ALL enemies.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BOOGEYMAN.title: Boogeyman
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BOOGEYMAN.description:
#Deal !D! damage.
{IfUpgraded:show:Draw !C! card(s).
|}[gold]Haunt[/gold] ALL cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-CURSED_BOOMERANG.title: Cursed Boomerang
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-CURSED_BOOMERANG.descript:
#Deal !D! damage !Repeat! times to a random enemy.
At the start of your next turn, return this to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-NECK_SNAP.title: Neck Snap
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-NECK_SNAP.description:
#[gold]Osty[/gold] deals !OstyDamage! damage.
Add [gold]Retain[/gold] to a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-NECK_SNAP.selectionScreen: Select a card to add [gold]Retain[/gold] to.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SOULWICK.title: Soulwick
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SIPHON_STRIKE.title: Siphon Strike
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SLAM.title: Slam
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SLAM.description:
#[gold]Osty[/gold] deals !OstyDamage! damage to ALL enemies.
Apply !WeakPower! [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SPIRIT_FIRE.title: Spirit Fire
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TAMP.title: Tamp
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-DISCORDANT_DITTY.title: Discordant Ditty
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-DUB_THEE_SIR_BONESY.title: Dub Thee Sir Bonesy
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-FRIGHTEN.title: Frighten
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-GET_SILLY.title: Get Silly
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-GOOFY_PUMPKIN.title: Goofy Pumpkin
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-GOOFY_PUMPKIN.description:
#[gold]Haunt[/gold] !Haunt! random cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Gain !GoofPower! [gold]Goof[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-LIMITLESS_BONES.title: Limitless Bones
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-VANISH.title: Vanish
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-WISPY_EXHUME.title: Wispy Exhume
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BOO.title: BOO!
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BOO.description:
#Deal !D! damage !Repeat! times.
[gold]Bury[/gold] !Bury! random card(s) in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], prioritizing [gold]Haunted[/gold] ones.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-PIANO_DROP.title: Piano Drop
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-PIANO_DROP.description:
#Deal !D! damage.
Apply !MisfortunePower! [gold]Misfortune[/gold].
Add !C! [gold]Dazed[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BUCKET_DOOR.title: Bucket Door
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BUCKET_DOOR.description:
#Apply !DoomPower! [gold]Doom[/gold] to yourself.
Deal !D! damage.
Add !Surprise! [gold]Surprise(s)[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-THINK_FAST.title: Think Fast
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-THINK_FAST.description:
#Add !Surprise! [gold]Surprise(s)[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and !MoreSurprises! [gold]Surprise(s)[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Draw !C! card(s).
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-THUMB_WAR.title: Thumb War
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-THUMB_WAR.description:
#[gold]Osty[/gold] deals !OstyDamage! damage !Repeat! times.
Gain !GoofPower! [gold]Goof[/gold].
Whenever you or [gold]Osty[/gold] hit this enemy this turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] !Summon!.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-PAINTED_TUNNEL.title: Painted Tunnel
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-PAINTED_TUNNEL.descriptio:
#Deal !D! damage to a random enemy !Repeat! times.
With each hit, apply !MisfortunePower! [gold]Misfortune[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-ZOMBIE_BUDDY.title: Zombie Buddy
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-ZOMBIE_BUDDY.description:
#Deal !CD! damage.
Deals !ExtraDamage! additional damage for each card in your [gold]Sepulchre Pile[/gold].
Add a copy of this card into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-ENDLESS_NIGHT.title: Endless Night
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-ENDLESS_NIGHT.description: #ALL cards in your Hand gain [gold]Haunted[/gold] and [gold]Bury[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BELOVED_THINGIES.title: Beloved Thingies
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BELOVED_THINGIES.descript:
#Apply !DoomPower! [gold]Doom[/gold] to yourself.
Choose !Haunt! card(s) in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to [gold]Haunt[/gold] and [gold]Bury[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-COYOTE_TIME.title: Coyote Time
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-COYOTE_TIME.description:
#Gain !B! [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw !C! card(s).
Next turn, apply !DoomNextTurnPower! [gold]Doom[/gold] to yourself.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-ETERNAL_SOULWICK.title: Eternal Soulwick
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-EXCHANGE.title: Exchange
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-FOUL_TEA_PARTY.title: Foul Tea Party
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-FOUL_TEA_PARTY.descriptio: ALL enemies gain [gold]Poison[/gold] equal to their [gold]Misfortune[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-LATER_PROBLEM.title: Later Problem
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-CROWS_GIFT.title: Crow's Gift
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-CROWS_GIFT.description: #Add !C! random Colorless card(s) on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]. {Cards:plural:It's|They're} free to play this combat.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-GIMME_A_HAND.title: Gimme a Hand
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-MIMIC_BINDY.title: Mimic Bindy
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-MIMIC_BINDY.description: #Choose 1 of 3 random {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded[/gold] }Necrobinder Powers to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-POSSESS_ASCENDER.title: Possess Ascender
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-POSSESS_ASCENDER.descript:
#Choose 1 of 3 random{IfUpgraded:show: [gold]Upgraded[/gold]|} Skills from another character to add into your [gold]Sepulchre Pile[/gold].
It gains [gold]Haunted[/gold] and [gold]Bury[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-CAVORT.title: Cavort
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-ECLIPSE.title: Eclipse
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-ECLIPSE.description: [gold]Haunted[/gold] cards in your [gold]Sepulchre Pile[/gold] are also played at the end of your turn.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BLEH.title: Bleh
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BLEH.description: #The first time each turn you draw a Status or Curse card, [gold]Transform[/gold] it into a random [gold]Treat[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BONE_VIGIL.title: Bone Vigil
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BLACK_CAT.title: Black Cat
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BLACK_CAT.description:
#Apply !DoomPower! [gold]Doom[/gold] to yourself.
Whenever a card is created, [gold]Bury[/gold] a random [gold]Haunted[/gold] card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] or [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-LIVING_ARMOR.title: Living Armor
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TIT_FOR_TAT.title: Tit for Tat
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TIT_FOR_TAT.description:
#Apply the amount of [gold]Doom[/gold] you have +{CalculatedDoomBase} to an enemy.{InCombat:
(Apply !CalculatedDoom! [gold]Doom[/gold].)}
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-ENCORE.title: Encore
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SPECTRE_STRIKE.title: Spectre Strike
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SPECTRE_STRIKE.descriptio:
#Deal !D! damage.
[gold]Haunt[/gold] !Haunt! random card(s) in your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
Put ALL [gold]Haunted[/gold] cards from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-LEASHED.title: Leashed
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-LEASHED.description:
#Apply !DoomPower! [gold]Doom[/gold] to yourself.
[gold]Osty[/gold] deals !CD! damage.
Deals additional damage equal to [gold]Osty's[/gold] current HP.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-JESTER.title: Jester
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-JESTER.description:
#Whenever you gain [gold]Goof[/gold], add !JesterPower! [gold]Strike(s)+[/gold] into your [gold]Sepulchre Pile[/gold].
{JesterPower:plural:It gains|They gain} [gold]Bury[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SKELETAL_STRIKE.title: Skeletal Strike
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SKELETAL_STRIKE.descripti:
#[gold]Osty[/gold] deals !OstyDamage! damage to ALL enemies.
Draw !C! card(s).
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BEWITCH.title: Bewitch
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-PLAYTIME.title: Playtime
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-PLAYTIME.description: #Choose up to !C! card(s) in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to [gold]Transform[/gold] into {Cards:plural:a random [gold]Treat[/gold]|random [gold]Treats[/gold]}.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-PLAYTIME.selectionScreenP: Choose up to {Amount} {Amount:plural:card|cards} to [gold]Transform[/gold] into {Amount:plural:a random [gold]Treat[/gold]|random [gold]Treats[/gold]}.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-REJUVENATE.title: Rejuvenate
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-REJUVENATE.description:
#[gold]Osty[/gold] heals !H! HP.
Lose !LoseDoom! [gold]Doom[/gold].
Add !Treat! random [gold]Treat(s)[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TRICK_AND_TREAT.title: Trick and Treat
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TRICK_AND_TREAT.descripti:
#Apply !MisfortunePower! [gold]Misfortune[/gold] X times to ALL enemies.
[gold]Summon[/gold] !Summon! X times.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-REVELRY.title: Revelry
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SCARECROW.title: Scarecrow
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SHOW_GOES_ON.title: Show Goes On
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SHOW_GOES_ON.description:
#Apply !DoomPower! [gold]Doom[/gold] to yourself.
Choose !C! cards in your [gold]Sepulchre Pile[/gold]. They gain [gold]Haunted[/gold] and [gold]Bury[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SPONTANEITY.title: Spontaneity
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SPONTANEITY.description: #Choose 1 of 3 random {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded [/gold]|}cards to [gold]Haunt[/gold] and add into your [gold]Sepulchre Pile[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TAKE_BACKSIES.title: Take Backsies
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TAKE_BACKSIES.description: #Put !C! cards from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold] and [gold]Haunt[/gold] them.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-DENSE_FOG.title: Dense Fog
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-CONJURING.title: Conjuring
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-CONJURING.description:
#Choose up to X{IfUpgraded:show:+1|} cards in your [gold]Sepulchre Pile[/gold] to play a copy of.
If this plays a card, [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-CONJURING.selectionScreen: #Choose up to {Amount} card(s) to play a copy of.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SPORK_ANTICS.title: Spork Antics
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BACK_IN_YOU_GO.title: Back In You Go
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BACK_IN_YOU_GO.descriptio: #At the start of your turn, [gold]Haunt[/gold] and [gold]Bury[/gold] !BackInYouGoPower! random card(s) in your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-RECIPROCATION.title: Reciprocation
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-RECIPROCATION.description: #Whenever you apply [gold]Doom[/gold], apply !ReciprocationPower! [gold]Misfortune[/gold] to ALL enemies.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TOPSY_TURVY.title: Topsy Turvy
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TOPSY_TURVY.description: #At the end of your turn, [gold]Bury[/gold] up to !TopsyTurvyPower! card(s) in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-HELPING_HANDS.title: Helping Hands
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-HELPING_HANDS.description:
[gold]Bury[/gold] a card. It gains [gold]Haunted[/gold] and [gold]Bury[/gold].
Add [gold]Helping Hand[/gold] into ALL allies' [gold]Hands[/gold] to do the same.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-HELPING_HANDS.selectionSc: Choose a card to [gold]Bury[/gold]. It gains [gold]Haunted[/gold] and [gold]Bury[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-HELPING_HAND.title: Helping Hand
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-HELPING_HAND.selectionScr: Choose a card to [gold]Bury[/gold]. It gains [gold]Haunted[/gold] and [gold]Bury[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BONES_OF_A_FEATHER.title: Bones of a Feather
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-COOKIE_CRUMBLE.title: Cookie Crumble
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-COOKIE_CRUMBLE.descriptio:
#{AlreadyPlayed:[color=DIM_GRAY]|}If this is the first time this card has been played, raise your Max HP by !MaxHp!.{AlreadyPlayed:[/color]|}
Deal !D! damage.

#{AlreadyPlayed:[color=DIM_GRAY]|}If this is the first time this card has been played, raise your Max HP by !MaxHp!.{AlreadyPlayed:[/color]|}
Deal !D! damage.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-HAND_OFF.title: Hand Off
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-HAND_OFF.description:
#[gold]Osty[/gold] deals !OstyDamage! damage to ALL enemies.
If [gold]Osty[/gold] is alive, gain !StrengthPower! [gold]Strength[/gold], and [gold]Osty[/gold] dies.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-DOPPELGANGER.title: Doppelganger
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-DOPPELGANGER.description: #Choose a card in your [gold]Sepulchre Pile[/gold]. Add a copy of it into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-DOPPELGANGER.selectionScr: Choose a card to copy into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-ASHES_TO_ASHES.title: Ashes to Ashes
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-ASHES_TO_ASHES.descriptio:
#Add [gold]Ethereal[/gold] to !C! random card(s) in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] or [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
Lose !LoseDoom! [gold]Doom[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-EEK.title: EEK!
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-EEK.description:
#Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies who intend to attack.
Apply !DebilitatePower! [gold]Debilitate[/gold] to those enemies.
When [gold]Buried[/gold], plays immediately.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-ALL_HALLOWS_EVE.title: All Hallows' Eve
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TOMBSTONE.title: Tombstone
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TOMBSTONE.description:
#Gain !CB! [gold]Block[/gold].
Gains !CalculationExtra! additional [gold]Block[/gold] for each card in your [gold]Sepulchre Pile[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-NEUROPURGE.title: Neuropurge
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-NEUROPURGE.description:
#[gold]Haunt[/gold] and [gold]Bury[/gold] ALL Powers in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Apply !DoomPower! [gold]Doom[/gold] to yourself.
At the start of your turn, apply !NeuropurgePower! [gold]Doom[/gold] to yourself.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-PRANKSTER_FORM.title: Prankster Form
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-PRANKSTER_FORM.descriptio: #Whenever you spend {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, for each {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} spent, apply !PranksterFormPower! [gold]Misfortune[/gold] to ALL enemies and gain !PranksterFormPower! [gold]Goof[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TWINSIES.title: Twinsies
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TWINSIES.description: #[gold]Bury[/gold] a copy of the first {TwinsiesPower:plural:|!TwinsiesPower! }manually played {TwinsiesPower:plural:card|cards} each turn.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-VAMPIRIC_WARD.title: Vampiric Ward
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-YOINKADOO.title: Yoinkadoo
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-OVERLOAD.title: Overload
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-OVERLOAD.description: Whenever a [gold]Haunted[/gold] card is [gold]Buried[/gold], it gains [gold]Bury[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-NECRO_MOCKERY.title: Necro Mockery
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-NECRO_MOCKERY.description: Whenever [gold]Osty[/gold] loses HP, a random enemy takes that much damage [gold]Unfortunately[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-PARAPHERNALIA.title: Paraphernalia
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-PARAPHERNALIA.description:
#ALL cards in your [gold]Sepulchre Pile[/gold] gain [gold]Haunted[/gold] and [gold]Bury[/gold].
[gold]Disinter[/gold] ALL cards in your [gold]Sepulchre Pile[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-GET_SMALL_ABOUT_IT.title: Get Small About It
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-OSSIFICATION.title: Ossification
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-OSSIFICATION.description:
#[gold]Osty[/gold] deals !CD! damage.
Deals an additional !ExtraDamage! damage for every time he has hit an enemy this combat.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SURPRISE.title: Surprise
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SURPRISE.description:
#Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies.
Draw !C! card(s).
When drawn, plays immediately.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-MILK_CHOCOLATE.title: Milk Chocolate
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-GUMMY_WORM.title: Gummy Worm
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-HOMEMADE_COOKIE.title: Homemade Cookie
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-LICORICE.title: Licorice
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BUBBLEGUM.title: Bubblegum
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-LOLLIPOP.title: Lollipop
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BOUNTIFUL_BUCKET.title: Bountiful Bucket
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SNACK.title: Snack
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SHAVING_CREAM.title: Shaving Cream
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SLAPSTICK.title: Slapstick
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SLAPSTICK.description: #At the start of your turn, add !SlapstickPower! [gold]Surprise(s)[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TICKING_CLOCK.title: Ticking Clock
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TICKING_CLOCK.description: #Add !Surprise! [gold]Surprise(s)[/gold] to the bottom of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SWITCHEROO.title: Switcheroo
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SWITCHEROO.description:
Swap and shuffle your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
Put this card into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-MISCHIEF.title: Mischief
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SUGAR_RUSH.title: Sugar Rush
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SUGAR_RUSH.description:
#Deal !D! damage.
Draw !C! card(s).
Choose {Treat:plural:a card|!Treat! cards} in your [gold]Hand[/gold] to [gold]Transform[/gold] into {Treat:plural:a random [gold]Treat[/gold]|random [gold]Treats[/gold]}.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SUGAR_RUSH.selectionScree: Choose {Amount:plural:a card|{} cards} to [gold]Transform[/gold] into {Amount:plural:a random [gold]Treat[/gold]|random [gold]Treats[/gold]}.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-CANDIED_HIJINKS.title: Candied Hijinks
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-CANDIED_HIJINKS.descripti:
#{TreatPlayed:|[color=DIM_GRAY]}If you played a {TreatPlayed:[gold]|}Treat{TreatPlayed:[/gold]|} this turn, add !Surprise! {TreatPlayed:[gold]|}{Surprise:plural:Surprise|Surprises}{TreatPlayed:[/gold]|} into your {TreatPlayed:[gold]|}Draw Pile{TreatPlayed:[/gold]|}.{TreatPlayed:|[/color]}
{SurprisePlayed:|[color=DIM_GRAY]}If you played a {SurprisePlayed:[gold]|}Surprise{SurprisePlayed:[/gold]|} this turn, add !Treat! random {SurprisePlayed:[gold]|}{Treat:plural:Treat|Treats}{SurprisePlayed:[/gold]|} into your {SurprisePlayed:[gold]|}Hand{SurprisePlayed:[/gold]|}.{SurprisePlayed:|[/color]}

#{TreatPlayed:|[color=DIM_GRAY]}If you played a {TreatPlayed:[gold]|}Treat{TreatPlayed:[/gold]|} this turn, add !Surprise! {TreatPlayed:[gold]|}{Surprise:plural:Surprise|Surprises}{TreatPlayed:[/gold]|} into your {TreatPlayed:[gold]|}Draw Pile{TreatPlayed:[/gold]|}.{TreatPlayed:|[/color]}
{SurprisePlayed:|[color=DIM_GRAY]}If you played a {SurprisePlayed:[gold]|}Surprise{SurprisePlayed:[/gold]|} this turn, add !Treat! random {SurprisePlayed:[gold]|}{Treat:plural:Treat|Treats}{SurprisePlayed:[/gold]|} into your {SurprisePlayed:[gold]|}Hand{SurprisePlayed:[/gold]|}.{SurprisePlayed:|[/color]}
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-FOOL_YOU_TWICE.title: Fool You Twice
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-FOOL_YOU_TWICE.descriptio: #Put ALL [gold]Surprises[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] from anywhere{IfUpgraded:show: and [gold]Upgrade[/gold] them|}.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-NEED_A_HAND.title: Need a Hand?
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-NEED_A_HAND.description: #Choose another player. They [gold]Summon[/gold] an amount equal to your [gold]Osty's[/gold] current HP.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-DOUBLE_TROUBLE.title: Double Trouble
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-DOUBLE_TROUBLE.descriptio: #Choose another player. They [gold]Bury[/gold] a copy of ALL cards in your [gold]Sepulchre Pile[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-YUCKY_BE_GONE.title: Yucky Be Gone
